accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate context (Do Not Pay system hosted by Treasury, SSA Commissioner, Section 205(r) amendments) is correctly stated.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; contextual identification of SSA and the Do Not Pay working system is accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose: improving coordination to reduce improper payments to deceased individuals.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly describes the amendments to Section 205(r) of the Social Security Act including new paragraphs (11), (12) and amended (7).

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes key conditions including the 'to the extent feasible' qualifier, paragraph (3)(A)-(B) requirements, and the clear-and-convincing-evidence threshold.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the December 27, 2026 effective date and February 10, 2026 approval date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures all essential operative provisions: data sharing, cost-sharing agreement, evidence standard, and error notification.

objective_tone.why: Tone is neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent, tracking the bill's structure logically.

concise.why: Appropriately detailed without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Social Security Act, Commissioner of Social Security, and the Do Not Pay working system.

correct_figures.why: The dates stated (December 27, 2026 and February 10, 2026) match the bill exactly.
